name: Airtable
description: Work with Airtable bases and records: list bases/tables, search records with filterByFormula, create/update/delete rows. WARNING: Free plan has only 1,000 API calls/month — for active agent use, Team plan (~20 USD/user/month) is recommended.

credentials_required.label: Airtable Personal Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at https://airtable.com/create/tokens. Minimum scopes: data.records:read, data.records:write, schema.bases:read. Restrict access to specific bases for security.

tools.name: list_bases
tools.description: List all Airtable bases the token has access to

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List tables in a base with their fields and views

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List records from a table, with optional filterByFormula, sort, maxRecords, view

tools.name: get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by ID

tools.name: create_record
tools.description: Create a new record with field values

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update fields on an existing record (partial update via PATCH)

author: freddy-schuetz
